history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A person dressed in all black, including a black t-shirt and black pants, is lying down on a light-colored, curved concrete ledge outdoors at night. Their body is positioned diagonally across the ledge, with their head resting on the left side and their legs extending towards the right. A black skateboard with a white cross graphic on its deck is propped up vertically against the left end of the ledge, near the person's head. The skateboard's wheels are visible. The person's left arm is bent, with their hand resting near their head, while their right arm hangs down towards the ground, with their hand dangling close to the concrete surface. The background features several palm trees with their fronds illuminated by artificial light, creating a soft, ethereal glow. Behind the palm trees, there's a dark night sky with distant city lights visible, suggesting an urban or suburban setting. The overall lighting is dim and atmospheric, with strong shadows cast by the palm trees and the ledge. The color palette is dominated by dark tones, with accents of the white cross on the skateboard and the warm glow of the distant lights. The mood is tranquil, slightly melancholic, and contemplative, with a sense of urban solitude. The scene has a cinematic quality, perhaps with a slight grainy texture.
